## Outcome

What changed?

## Runtime Owner

- [ ] Local host / boot / state
- [ ] Scene composition
- [ ] Assets / Three.js
- [ ] Sculpture / effects / audio
- [ ] Card panels
- [ ] Input / interaction
- [ ] Motion / camera / render loop
- [ ] Local workspace / card loop
- [ ] Local ValenGateway / contracts
- [ ] Docs / contribution flow

## Proof

Commands run:

```bash
npm run check
```

Browser proof, if visual or interactive:

```bash
npm run proof:browser
```

## Public Boundary

- [ ] No private workspace identifiers
- [ ] No hosted proxy, payment, domain, email, ad, or customer-data wiring
- [ ] No production tokens or secrets
- [ ] No claim that local proof is hosted production proof

## Reviewer Focus

What should reviewers look at first?
